deck_goal: Recommend a grounded China EV market-entry plan for Europe and Southeast Asia.
audience: Regional strategy leaders deciding 2025 market sequencing

slides.title: Recommend a grounded China EV market-entry plan for Europe and Southeast Asia.
slides.goal: Orient the audience to the presentation goal and source scope.
key_points: Regional strategy leaders deciding 2025 market sequencing
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce the deck goal and emphasize that claims stay grounded to source material.

slides.title: Decision Backbone
slides.goal: Compress the source pack into the minimum grounded claims the deck must preserve.
key_points: 2022-2024 年，中国新能源汽车出口节奏已经从单点放量转向分区域深化。
欧洲适合追求品牌抬升与高客单价，东南亚更适合追求进入速度与渠道复制。
先在东南亚建立渠道和售后，再择机进入欧洲，是更稳妥的 2025 市场进入路径。
slides.speaker_notes: This slide compresses the source pack into the minimum set of claims the deck must retain.

slides.title: 出口时间线
slides.goal: Show how the grounded evidence changes over time.
key_points: 2022-2024 年，中国新能源汽车出口节奏已经从单点放量转向分区域深化。
slides.speaker_notes: Ground this slide in src-01:sec-01 and keep the structure editable.

slides.title: 欧洲 vs 东南亚对比
slides.goal: Contrast grounded market options without losing source traceability.
key_points: 欧洲适合追求品牌抬升与高客单价，东南亚更适合追求进入速度与渠道复制。
slides.speaker_notes: Ground this slide in src-01:sec-02 and keep the structure editable.

slides.title: 进入路径
slides.goal: Turn grounded evidence into an ordered action path.
key_points: 先在东南亚建立渠道和售后，再择机进入欧洲，是更稳妥的 2025 市场进入路径。
slides.speaker_notes: Ground this slide in src-02:sec-01 and keep the structure editable.

slides.title: 成本与利润指标
slides.goal: Surface the grounded numeric signal that should shape the decision.
key_points: 18% 的电池成本降幅为价格带竞争和渠道投入提供了缓冲空间。
slides.speaker_notes: Ground this slide in src-03:sec-01 and keep the structure editable.
